case_title: CHOW, RAYMOND DBA GEORGETOWN PROPERTIES vs. WILLIAMS, LUINS et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LUINS TAYLOR, DARRYL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, RAYMOND DBA GEORGETOWN PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LUINS DARRYL TAYLOR DOES 1 TO 10 TAYLOR, DARRYL SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, RAYMOND DBA GEORGETOWN PROPERTIES SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS JONES, DARRYL TO BE DARRYL TAYLOR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LUINS DARRYL TAYLOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1900 WASHINGTON STREET #604, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES ALL RENTS & DAMAGES AND IS TO RETURN MARCH/APRIL RENT IN AMT OF $1700.00 TO DEFTS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES. NO FURTHER STAYS FOR ANY REASON INCLUDING ANY MOTIONS.PLTF TO RETURN TO DFT WILLIAMS SEC DEPOSIT IN AMT OF $1275.00 PLUS 15% INT.PLTF WILL FILE DISM IF TERMS COMPLIED.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-25-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
